subcodes.first_line: O Ali! The Wronged One of the world remembers thee in His Most Great Prison, and summons thee unto a station wherein doubts shall not cause thee to stumble [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی یذکرک مظلوم العالم فی سجنه الاعظم و یدعوک الی مقام لا تزلک شبهات
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
